column45: IMPORTANT: This section of STAT C1000 is linked to STAT 80S, a support course that offers additional support and an assigned tutor. Both sections (CRNs 73870 and 73877) MUST be added together. This class requires in-person meetings and the use of Canvas. In-person meetings will take place on Tuesdays from 11:10am - 1:25pm on the Ocean Campus. Students will also complete coursework in Canvas, which must be accessed using an internet enabled device. This class is part of CityOnline and is 17.5 weeks. Students can send email to the instructor if they have questions before the semester begins.
